name: procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies managing 5–15 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, inefficient management causes missed deadlines and supplier penalties. We simplify contract management instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and email reminders.
target_audience: procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies managing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
problem_solved: Inefficient management of vendor contracts leading to missed deadlines and penalties.

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies managing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient management of vendor contracts leading to missed deadlines and penalties.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, inefficient management causes missed deadlines and supplier penalties. We simplify contract management instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and email reminders.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking through spreadsheets and email reminders

one_liner: For procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, inefficient management causes missed deadlines and supplier penalties. We simplify contract management instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and email reminders.
